videos.headline: Liam Szarka rushes in for 7-yard Air Force TD
videos.description: Liam Szarka rushes for a 7-yard touchdown to put Air Force on the board.

videos.headline: Blake Horvath finds Eli Heidenreich for go-ahead TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath throws a 60-yard pass to Eli Heidenreich for a go-ahead Navy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath finds Eli Heidenreich for go-ahead TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jonah Dawson makes great grab for Air Force TD
videos.description: Jonah Dawson hauls in a contested 53-yard touchdown pass from Liam Szarka for Air Force.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jonah Dawson makes great grab for Air Force TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath finds Eli Heidenreich for 80-yard Navy TD
